statCardTonePolicy: A10d1 stat cards are recolored toward the HP card cyan-green stat-upgrade tone. Embedded icon policy is maintained; code-side icon overlay stays disabled for normal stat cards.

implementation.statCardManifest: Registered A10d.1 stat card variants and routed tagless stat upgrades to those textures.
implementation.embeddedIconPolicy: Maintained. Normal stat cards do not add separate code-side stat icon sprites.
implementation.candidatePortrait: Candidate portrait sprite is rendered above the portrait frame interior and reloads from portraitPath/heroPath.
implementation.branchPortrait: BRANCH portrait sprite is rendered above the generated frame interior, with larger upper-left HUD placement.

qa.nodeCheck: passed: levelup_ui.js, evolution_ready_ui.js, hud.js, play_scene.js, asset_manifest.js
qa.browserRuntime: passed: in-app browser console error/warn 0 during A10d.1 candidate and BRANCH QA

screenQa.statCards: QA sheet shows attack/speed/rate/pickup/common cards shifted toward the HP teal stat-card tone.
screenQa.evolutionCandidatePortrait: Verified portrait visible inside the evolution candidate card via debugEvolutionReady=speed.
screenQa.branchPortrait: Verified portrait visible inside the BRANCH HUD card via debugEvolution=speed.
